summary: Digitally recorded audience tape with exceptional detail and a soaring "Comes A Time" jam
review: Both reviewers rave about the audio fidelity of this digitized audience source, calling it the most detailed and best‑sounding Dead recording they’ve heard. The performance is highlighted by an especially inspired "Comes A Time" improvisation that they liken to climbing a wall. No criticisms are noted, making it a highly recommended listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on both the sound quality and the performance, but only two reviews limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Praised for amazing detail from spaced Mk2s; digitized source considered the best among all audience recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers focus on overall performance quality.
